name: trailgenic
description: Physiological methodology, fasted hiking protocols, altitude adaptation, longevity science, and structured trail-session data.
routing_notes: Route here when the request involves physiological mechanisms, hiking methodology, protocol tiers, biomarker interpretation, or TrailGenic-specific content.

name: exmxc
description: Institutional intelligence doctrine, AI-search authority strategy, structural market analysis, and entity intelligence frameworks.
routing_notes: Route here when the request involves AI industry analysis, entity intelligence scoring, doctrine application, structural market framing, or the four forces framework.

name: mikeye
description: Operator judgment, M&A and corporate development framing, advisory product design, and personal voice content.
routing_notes: Route here when the request involves operator-level judgment, M&A framing, advisory product specs, personal voice content, or references to Mike Ye's professional experience.

name: ella_entity
description: Architecture, routing, and orchestration design for the Ella Entity interpretation layer itself.
routing_notes: Route here when the request is about Ella Entity's own design, implementation, routing logic, adapter interfaces, or system parameters.

name: hybrid
description: Cross-domain synthesis requiring assets or framing from multiple domains simultaneously.
routing_notes: Route here when the request explicitly requires combining assets or perspectives from two or more domains. Do not default to hybrid — only use when cross-domain synthesis is genuinely required.
